checks.label: Device Encryption
checks.description: Device storage should be encrypted, This property reports the encryption state of the device internal storage (userdata partition).

checks.label: Encryption Type
checks.description: Indicates encryption type. Safe ONLY if output is exactly 'file' (FBE) or 'block' (FDE). Prevents partial matches or noisy output.

checks.label: Default Encryption Password Check
checks.description: Safe ONLY when '0'. '1' means encryption uses default password, which is insecure. Strict anchoring avoids matching numbers inside longer strings.

checks.label: Encryption Completion Status
checks.description: Full Disk Encryption is complete only if output is exactly '1'. A strict equality match ensures no accidental pattern hits.

checks.label: Data Partition Encryption Check
checks.description: Safe ONLY if /data is mounted on a 'dm-*' device, which indicates encryption. Raw eMMC partitions ('mmcblk0pXX') mean unencrypted storage. This match is stable because dm- devices cannot appear in plain, unencrypted mounts.

checks.label: FBE FUSE Layer Status
checks.description: File-Based Encryption is active only if output is exactly 'true'. Anchors prevent accidental matches of longer boolean strings.

checks.label: Service-Based Encryption Check
checks.description: Encryption is typically active when the response contains '00000001'. Because binder output is structured, this specific pattern is reliable with minimal false-positive risk.

checks.label: SD Card Encryption
checks.description: Safe ONLY when output is exactly '1'. Strict match prevents accidental detection from logs or metadata containing '1'.

checks.label: SD Card Mount Check
checks.description: Safe if SD card is mounted via dm-crypt or FUSE. Pattern is strict enough to avoid accidental substring matches on unrelated mount entries.

checks.label: API Keys in Files
checks.description: Files containing API keys or secrets

checks.label: Private Keys Exposed
checks.description: Private key files found - should be protected

checks.label: SSH Keys on Device
checks.description: SSH keys found - review if needed

checks.label: Default Credential Files
checks.description: Credential files in system - check permissions

checks.label: Database Files with Potential Secrets
checks.description: Database files - may contain sensitive data
